message:
feat(assign): add file reservation integration with Agent Mail

Implement FileReservationManager to automatically reserve file paths
mentioned in bead descriptions when assigning beads to agents:

- Add ExtractFilePaths to detect files/globs from title and description
  - Handles explicit paths (src/api/handler.go)
  - Handles dotfiles (.env, .env.local, .gitignore)
  - Handles glob patterns (**/*.go)
  - Handles directory references (internal/cli → internal/cli/**/*)
  - Excludes URLs, version strings, and common non-path patterns

- Integrate with Agent Mail file_reservation_paths API
  - Reserve files on bead assignment
  - Release reservations on completion
  - Handle conflicts gracefully with partial grant support
  - Support TTL management and renewal

- Add comprehensive unit tests for all functionality

Closes: bd-1ohy

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
